# Umculo

> Free, professional music websites for South African artists.

Umculo is a programme by [Qwabi Engineering](https://www.qwabi.co.za) in partnership with [Xhosa Hip Hop](https://xhosahiphop.co.za). We build custom artist websites — not templates — with SEO, blog, press pages, and two years of free hosting on `yourname.umculo.app`.

## Key facts

- **Offer:** 10 free custom artist websites in the first batch
- **Slots remaining:** 4 of 10 (as of 2026-07-02)
- **Timeline:** ~2 weeks from application to launch
- **Includes:** Custom design, responsive site, bio/music/gallery/press, blog, SEO + AI discovery optimisation, 2 years hosting
- **Cost:** R0 for the launch cohort
- **Contact:** WhatsApp (primary), email aya@qwabi.co.za, phone +27603116777

## Live examples

- [Yung Savage QTN](https://savage.umculo.app)
- [Mzukhona](https://mzukhona.umculo.app)

## Pages

- [Home](https://umculo.app/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://umculo.app/privacy)
- [Offer details](https://umculo.app/offer.md)

## Operator

Namoota Technology (Pty) Ltd, trading as Qwabi Engineering  
https://business.qwabi.co.za
